title: ‘Hamilton’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Lin-Manuel Miranda
fact: Hamilton: An American Musical is a sung-and-rapped-through biographical musical with music, lyrics, and a book by Lin-Manuel Miranda.

title: ‘The Book of Mormon’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Matt Stone
fact: The Book of Mormon is an American musical comedy with music, lyrics, and book by Trey Parker, Robert Lopez, and Matt Stone.

title: ‘Cabaret’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by John Kander
fact: Cabaret is an American musical with music by John Kander, lyrics by Fred Ebb, and a book by Joe Masteroff.

title: ‘The Phantom of the Opera’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Andrew Lloyd Webber
fact: The Phantom of the Opera is a musical with music by Andrew Lloyd Webber, lyrics by Charles Hart, additional lyrics by Richard Stilgoe, and a libretto by Lloyd Webber and Stilgoe.

title: ‘Jesus Christ Superstar’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Andrew Lloyd Webber
fact: Jesus Christ Superstar is a sung-through rock opera with music by Andrew Lloyd Webber and lyrics by Tim Rice.

title: ‘Les Misérables’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Claude-Michel Schönberg
fact: Les Misérables, colloquially known as Les Mis or Les Miz, is a sung-through musical with music by Claude-Michel Schönberg, lyrics by Alain Boublil and Jean-Marc Natel, and a book by Boublil and Schönberg, based on the 1862 novel of the same name by Victor Hugo.

title: ‘Wicked’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Stephen Schwartz
fact: Wicked is a musical with music and lyrics by Stephen Schwartz and a book by Winnie Holzman.

title: ‘Harry Potter and the Cursed Child’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Imogen Heap
fact: Harry Potter and the Cursed Child is a play written by Jack Thorne from an original story by Thorne, J.

title: ‘Chicago’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by John Kander
fact: Chicago is an American musical with music by John Kander, lyrics by Fred Ebb, and book by Ebb and Bob Fosse.

title: ‘West Side Story’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Leonard Bernstein
fact: West Side Story is a musical conceived by Jerome Robbins with music by Leonard Bernstein, lyrics by Stephen Sondheim, and a book by Arthur Laurents.

title: ‘Chess’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Benny Andersson
fact: Chess is a musical with music by Benny Andersson and Björn Ulvaeus of the pop group ABBA, lyrics by Ulvaeus and Tim Rice, and book by Rice.

title: ‘Cats’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Andrew Lloyd Webber
fact: Cats is a sung-through musical with music by Andrew Lloyd Webber.

title: ‘Miss Saigon’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Claude-Michel Schönberg
fact: Miss Saigon is a sung-through stage musical by Claude-Michel Schönberg and Alain Boublil, with lyrics by Boublil and Richard Maltby Jr.

title: ‘Dear Evan Hansen’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Justin Paul
fact: Dear Evan Hansen is a stage musical with music and lyrics by Benj Pasek and Justin Paul, and a book by Steven Levenson.

title: ‘Rent’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Jonathan Larson
fact: Rent is a rock musical with music, lyrics, and book by Jonathan Larson.

title: ‘Into the Woods’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Stephen Sondheim
fact: Into the Woods is a 1986 musical with music and lyrics by Stephen Sondheim and book by James Lapine.

title: ‘Fiddler on the Roof’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Jerry Bock
fact: Fiddler on the Roof is a musical with music by Jerry Bock, lyrics by Sheldon Harnick, and book by Joseph Stein, set in the Pale of Settlement of Imperial Russia in or around 1905.

title: ‘Joseph and the Amazing Technicolor Dreamcoat’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Andrew Lloyd Webber
fact: Joseph and the Amazing Technicolor Dreamcoat is a sung-through musical with music by Andrew Lloyd Webber and lyrics by Tim Rice, based on the character Joseph from the Bible's Book of Genesis.

title: ‘Spring Awakening’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Duncan Sheik
fact: Spring Awakening is a coming-of-age rock musical with music by Duncan Sheik and a book and lyrics by Steven Sater.

title: ‘The Sound of Music’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Richard Rodgers
fact: The Sound of Music is a musical with music by Richard Rodgers, lyrics by Oscar Hammerstein II, and a book by Howard Lindsay and Russel Crouse.

title: ‘Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Stephen Sondheim
fact: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street is a 1979 musical with music and lyrics by Stephen Sondheim, book by Hugh Wheeler.

title: ‘Evita’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Andrew Lloyd Webber
fact: Evita is a sung-through musical with music by Andrew Lloyd Webber and lyrics by Tim Rice.

title: ‘Mamma Mia!’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Benny Andersson
fact: Mamma Mia!

title: ‘Hair’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Galt MacDermot
fact: Hair: The American Tribal Love-Rock Musical is a rock musical with a book and lyrics by Gerome Ragni and James Rado and music by Galt MacDermot.

title: ‘The Rocky Horror Show’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Richard O'Brien
fact: The Rocky Horror Show is a musical with music, lyrics and book by Richard O'Brien.

title: ‘Annie’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Charles Strouse
fact: Annie is a musical with music by Charles Strouse, lyrics by Martin Charnin, and a book by Thomas Meehan.

title: ‘Avenue Q’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Jeff Marx
fact: Avenue Q is a musical comedy featuring puppets and human actors with music and lyrics by Robert Lopez and Jeff Marx and a book by Jeff Whitty.

title: ‘Grease’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Warren Casey
fact: Grease is a 1971 musical with music, lyrics, and a book by Jim Jacobs and Warren Casey.

title: ‘Oliver!’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Lionel Bart
fact: Oliver!

title: ‘A Chorus Line’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Marvin Hamlisch
fact: A Chorus Line is a 1975 musical conceived by Michael Bennett with music by Marvin Hamlisch, lyrics by Edward Kleban, and a book by James Kirkwood Jr. and Nicholas Dante.

title: ‘The Producers’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Mel Brooks
fact: The Producers is a musical comedy with music and lyrics by Mel Brooks and a book by Brooks and Thomas Meehan.

title: ‘My Fair Lady’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Frederick Loewe
fact: My Fair Lady is a musical with a book and lyrics by Alan Jay Lerner and music by Frederick Loewe.

title: ‘The Lion King’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Elton John
fact: The Lion King is a stage musical with a book by Roger Allers and Irene Mecchi based on the 1994 Walt Disney Animation Studios' film of the same name.

title: ‘Billy Elliot the Musical’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Elton John
fact: Billy Elliot: The Musical is a coming-of-age stage musical based on the 2000 film of the same name.

title: ‘Beauty and the Beast’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Alan Menken
fact: Beauty and the Beast is a musical, with music by Alan Menken, lyrics by Howard Ashman and Tim Rice, and book by Linda Woolverton.

title: ‘Nixon in China’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by John Adams
fact: Nixon in China is an opera in three acts by John Adams with a libretto by Alice Goodman.

title: ‘Notre-Dame de Paris’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Riccardo Cocciante
fact: Notre-Dame de Paris is a sung-through French musical which debuted on 16 September 1998 in Paris.

title: ‘Dialogues of the Carmelites’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Francis Poulenc
fact: Dialogues des Carmélites, FP 159, is an opera in three acts, divided into twelve scenes with linking orchestral interludes, with music and libretto by Francis Poulenc, completed in 1956.

title: ‘Spartacus’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Aram Khachaturian
fact: Spartacus is a ballet by Aram Khachaturian (1903–1978).

title: ‘The Rake's Progress’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Igor Stravinsky
fact: The Rake's Progress is an English-language opera from 1951 in three acts and an epilogue by Igor Stravinsky.
